rationale: Educ. Code §33.154 governs the commissioner's duties for the Communities In Schools program. It is wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote:
The commissioner shall:
(1) coordinate the efforts of the Communities In Schools program with other social service organizations and agencies and with public school personnel to provide services to students who are at risk of dropping out of school or engaging in delinquent conduct
_note: No conflict. The rule addresses dropout-prevention program administration, not property tax exemptions.
